title: Supreme Court takes suo motu cognisance of brutal stabbing of lawyer by her husband
description: The Supreme Court has taken suo motu cognisance of an incident where a lawyer was brutally stabbed by her husband, leaving her in a critical health condition [In Re: Brutal Assault on a Member of the Legal Fraternity and need For Judicial Intervention].A Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi briefly heard the matter today. The lawyer, advocate Madhu Rajput, practices before courts in Delhi. She is reported to have been stabbed last night with a sword by her
